title: Fix quiz question progression issue

requirements.text: Debug and fix the issue preventing users from advancing through quiz questions when attempting to submit answers

quotes: not allowing question to go through

acceptanceCriteria: Users can successfully select an answer and progress to the next question
The 'Next' or submit button responds to clicks without errors
Question progression works for both authenticated and anonymous users
All quiz questions can be completed and the results page is reached

requirements.text: Verify the quiz submission logic correctly sends data to the backend when authenticated and to localStorage when anonymous
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users' quiz submissions successfully reach the backend
Anonymous users' results are correctly stored in localStorage
No console errors occur during the submission process
The results page displays the submitted answers correctly

constraints: Do not modify the backend actor logic or data structures
Maintain compatibility with existing Internet Identity authentication flow
Preserve the current quiz flow and user experience design
nonGoals: Adding new quiz questions or modifying question content
Modifying the app market metadata or publication settings
